context: Tests whether the WidgetKit skill corrects server-driven widget push reload designs without confusing WidgetKit pushes with ActivityKit broadcast channels or generic notification registration.

checklist.name: Handler registration
checklist.description: States that `WidgetPushHandler` is registered on the widget's `WidgetConfiguration` with `.pushHandler(...)`, and that the handler type must be available to the widget extension or shared code rather than only the app target.

checklist.name: Widget push setup
checklist.description: Mentions adding Push Notifications capability to the widget extension and using WidgetKit push tokens rather than User Notifications registration for the widget.

checklist.name: Widget APNs contract
checklist.description: Names the WidgetKit APNs requirements: `apns-push-type: widgets`, topic suffix `.push-type.widgets`, and an `aps` payload with `content-changed: true`.

checklist.name: Timeline and budget behavior
checklist.description: Explains that WidgetKit pushes are budgeted/opportunistic reload signals that supplement timelines; the timeline provider and reload policy remain the source of displayed entries and fallback freshness.

checklist.name: Broadcast channel boundary
checklist.description: Rejects APNs broadcast channels as a WidgetKit timeline update mechanism and keeps ActivityKit broadcast-channel details out of the widget push design except as a boundary.
